title: HighTide's More Advancements
description: A basic Java Edition mod that adds some more advancements to the vanilla game.
body:
## What is it? **HighTide's More Advancements** is pretty self-explanatory honestly. All this mod does is add some new achievements to make 100%ing the game a bit longer of a task. I also aim to expand on some sections of the game that lack advancements like _The End_. As of right now (Wednesday, August 14th), development has focused on the _Overworld_ as compared to any other dimension at the moment. ## What Does it Change? As I said in the section above, **HighTide's More Advancements** mainly focuses on the Overworld at the moment. As for what it changes, it adds some advancements to Minecraft to make it a bigger game in general. ## Examples? Below I will show you some examples of advancements you can obtain by playing with this mod.
Fighting Chance Advancement Advancement Name: Fighting Chance
Advancement Image:
Advancement Description: Craft any variant of Sword
Benchmarking Advancement Advancement Name: Benchmarking
Advancement Image:
Advancement Description: Use 4 Planks to craft a Crafting Table
Farm Ready Advancement Advancement Name: Farm Ready
Advancement Image:
Advancement Description: Craft any variant of Farming Hoe
